description_long: This is a robust, rectangular metal shelving frame with four horizontal support bars and two solid side rails, designed for heavy-duty storage or organizational use. The structure is open on the top and bottom, allowing for easy access and ventilation, and the frame appears to be constructed from thick, welded steel beams. The finish is a matte black, giving it a modern, industrial look suitable for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or utility rooms. The shelf lacks any doors, drawers, or enclosed compartments, emphasizing its utilitarian function. There are no visible handles, glass panels, or decorative elements, and the design prioritizes strength and stability. The open grid layout allows for the placement of large or irregularly shaped items, making it versatile for various storage needs.
description: A sturdy, open-frame black metal shelving unit with four horizontal supports and solid side rails, ideal for heavy-duty urban storage. Its industrial design is functional and minimalistic.
description_view_0: Front view showing three evenly spaced horizontal support bars and the solid side rails.
description_view_1: Side angle revealing the depth of the frame and the four vertical support sections.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with clear visibility of the horizontal supports and side rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side angle, again showing the depth and the four vertical support sections.
